ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Continued To Mar-21-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to MAR-21-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; Clerk MOlopernes/YMazariegos. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Judgment is GRANTED. No opposition was filed. Prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order according to the Court's ruling and specifying date of filing of judgement to be vacated.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, bus. tel: (530) 339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)
